title: Java Messenger App
description: Multi-threaded client-server messaging application with JavaFX GUI, socket programming, and real-time message delivery.
overview: A real-time messaging application built with Java featuring a client-server architecture. Implemented socket programming for network communication and JavaFX for an intuitive graphical user interface.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Designed and implemented a multi-threaded server capable of handling concurrent client connections
Built a JavaFX-based GUI client with real-time message updates and user-friendly interface
Implemented TCP socket programming for reliable message delivery between clients
Created a custom message protocol for client-server communication
Added features including user authentication, message history, and connection status indicators
